hero.label: Ultra Lab · knowledge base
hero.desc: The deepest ultra running knowledge in one place. Strategies, experiences and proven methods from top runners.

pipeline.desc: Ultra Lab continuously monitors top podcast channels and YouTube sources. When new content appears, it automatically processes and sends it for review.
pipeline.step1_desc: Daily automatic check of all YouTube channels
pipeline.step2_desc: Free youtube-transcript-api, no API key needed
pipeline.step3_desc: Claude AI writes a structured knowledge article
pipeline.step4_desc: Email notification – you edit and publish
